title: casearia angustifolia
intro: Casearia angustifolia, also known as the Sensitive Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Casearia angustifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Casearia angustifolia can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
